stories.title: Opposition scouting: How the USMNT can counter Aus...
stories.summary: With both teams coming off wins in their World Cup openers, the United States and Australia know victory would see them qualify for the knockout stage.

stories.title: Pulisic (calf) out of USMNT's clash with Australia...
stories.summary: United States star Christian Pulisic is out of the team's World Cup clash with Australia due to a calf injury, with Ricardo Pepi starting in his place.

stories.title: Toews, Stanley Cup and Olympic champ, retires
stories.summary: Jonathan Toews, a three-time Stanley Cup champion with the Blackhawks and two-time Olympic gold medalist with Canada, has announced his retirement.

stories.title: Green Bay's Gottlieb extended through 2030-31
stories.summary: Green Bay coach Doug Gottlieb has agreed to a contract extension that takes his deal through the 2030-31 season.

stories.title: Canada, Marsch 'shaken' by gruesome Koné injury
stories.summary: Canada midfielder Ismaël Koné was stretchered off the field in the second half of the host nation's match against Qatar on Thursday at BC Place in Vancouver.
